description: Fragment of a legal document, probably a conditional betrothal (qiddushin, l. 6). Probably in the hand of Hillel b. ʿEli (previously catalogued on PGP as Natan b. Shemuel). Quotes speech of one or more parties, including "I fear that. . . I accepted a condition on myself that. . . I fear that he will turn back from (anā ākhshā an yanthanī). . ." AA/ASE
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
